title: Legislators
description: Develop, introduce, or enact laws and statutes at the local, tribal, state, or federal level. Includes only workers in elected positions.

tasks.text: Analyze and understand the local and national implications of proposed legislation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Appoint nominees to leadership posts, or approve such appointments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with colleagues to formulate positions and strategies pertaining to pending issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Debate the merits of proposals and bill amendments during floor sessions, following the appropriate rules of procedure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop expertise in subject matters related to committee assignments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hear testimony from constituents, representatives of interest groups, board and commission members, and others with an interest in bills or issues under consideration.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep abreast of the issues affecting constituents by making personal visits and phone calls, reading local newspapers, and viewing or listening to local broadcasts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of relevant national and international current events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make decisions that balance the perspectives of private citizens, public officials, and party leaders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate with colleagues or members of other political parties in order to reconcile differing interests, and to create policies and agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare drafts of amendments, government policies, laws, rules, regulations, budgets, programs and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read and review concerns of constituents or the general public and determine if governmental action is necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Represent their parties in negotiations with political executives or members of other parties, and when speaking with the media.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review bills in committee, and make recommendations about their future.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Seek federal funding for local projects and programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve on commissions, investigative panels, study groups, and committees in order to examine specialized areas and recommend action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Vote on motions, amendments, and decisions on whether or not to report a bill out from committee to the assembly floor.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write, prepare, and deliver statements for the Congressional Record.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Alert constituents of government actions and programs by way of newsletters, personal appearances at town meetings, phone calls, and individual meetings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend receptions, dinners, and conferences to meet people, exchange views and information, and develop working relationships.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct "head counts" to help predict the outcome of upcoming votes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine campaign strategies for media advertising, positions on issues, and public appearances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Encourage and support party candidates for political office.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish personal offices in local districts or states, and manage office staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the structure, efficiency, activities, and performance of government agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and maintain campaign organizations and fundraisers, in order to raise money for election or re-election.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oversee expense allowances, ensuring that accounts are balanced at the end of each fiscal year.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Promote the industries and products of their electoral districts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Represent their government at local, national, and international meetings and conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Speak to students to encourage and support the development of future political leaders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
